studies.title: Efficacy of the novel app-based self-help parent management training hiToco® for children with ADHD – a randomized controlled trial

_verification.reason: The study is specifically about the digital therapeutic product hiToco®: ADHS Elterntraining, as evidenced by the product name appearing in the title and throughout the trial registration details.

_classification.reason: Keyword match: 3 RCT indicators vs 1 RWE indicators.

studies.title: Randomised controlled pilot study on the clinical benefit of the smartphone app medigital® ADHD/OPP (powered by eyelevel)

_verification.reason: The study is specifically about the app initially named 'medigital® ADHS/OPP', which was later renamed to 'hiToco®'. This is explicitly stated in the full text, confirming that the study concerns the digital therapeutic product hiToco®: ADHS Elterntraining.

_classification.reason: The study is described as a 'randomized controlled pilot study', indicating that participants are randomly allocated to an intervention group using the smartphone app and a control group receiving standard therapy. This randomization and control under trial conditions classify it as an RCT.
